_readme: Top-5 real-user Aahaa wow-moment feeds generated on the local Nakama stack. users[] is ranked by wow-feed richness (sum over active wows of tierWeight{S:6,A:5,B:4,C:3,D:2,E:1} x priorityWeight{trust:1.5,engagement:1.2,monetisation:1.0}). Each wow carries fully rendered copy (real substituted values from the user fact pack) and the signal lineage chip explaining why it fired. top_moments[] counts which catalog wow_ids fired most across ALL users with non-empty feeds. HONESTY NOTE: this local DB contains only test/dev personas (device IDs are all test-/smoke-/showcase-/vfy- prefixed); the ranked users are the richest-gameplay-history accounts available, not production players.
